title: Old Spawn Eggs [OSE]
description: Replaces new icons of spawn eggs with the old ones.
body:
# Old Spawn Eggs [OSE]
This simple resourse pack **replaces new spawn eggs to the old ones**.
### What it looks like:

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eabf4af1780c639215cd061e0711f7e5be4c9b7_0.webp)
